---
title: "Concept"
date: 2026-04-21
categories: [concept]
draft: false
---

## Concept

Concept notes collect reusable background knowledge for reading papers. They are not full reviews; each page should clarify a concept enough to make future papers easier to read.

## Scope

Concept pages are for recurring terms, mechanisms, models, and methods that are useful across papers.

## Index

| Index | Title | Category | Added |
|---|---|---|---|
| 001 | [TH2](immunology/th2.qmd) | Immunology | 2026-04-21 |
| 002 | [Apoptosis](cancer/apoptosis.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-04-29 |
| 003 | [Necroptosis](cancer/necroptosis.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-04-29 |
| 004 | [Pyroptosis](cancer/pyroptosis.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-04-29 |
| 005 | [Ferroptosis](cancer/ferroptosis.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-04-29 |
| 006 | [Cell Annotation](single-cell/cell-annotation.qmd) | Single-cell | 2026-05-05 |
| 007 | [EASI](immunology/easi.qmd) | Immunology | 2026-05-05 |
| 008 | [Multicellular Ecosystem](cancer/multicellular-ecosystem.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-18 |
| 009 | [Tissue Organization](cancer/tissue-organization.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-18 |
| 010 | [Phenotypic Variation](cancer/phenotypic-variation.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-18 |
| 011 | [Dynamic Signalling Hub](cancer/dynamic-signalling-hub.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-18 |
| 012 | [cfDNA](cancer/cfdna.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-18 |
| 013 | [CpG Island](genetic/cpg-island.qmd) | Genetic | 2026-05-18 |
| 014 | [Genes](genetic/gene.qmd) | Genetic | 2026-05-19 |
| 015 | [Copy Number Variation](genetic/cnv.qmd) | Genetic | 2026-05-19 |
| 016 | [Tumor Microenvironment](cancer/tme.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-20 |
| 017 | [Cancer-Associated Fibroblast](cancer/caf.qmd) | Cancer | 2026-05-20 |
| 018 | [Melanoma](disease/melanoma.qmd) | Disease | 2026-05-20 |
| 019 | [Cycling and Noncycling Cells](single-cell/cycling-noncycling-cells.qmd) | Single-cell | 2026-05-20 |

## Use

Create a concept page when a term appears repeatedly, blocks understanding, or connects multiple papers.
